mapper.insert: insert into bookmark(bookmark_member, bookmark_type, bookmark_target) values (#{bookmarkMember}, #{bookmarkType}, #{bookmarkTarget})
mapper.select: select b.bookmark_target as streamer_no, bs.streamer_name, bs.streamer_soop_id, ssl.official_ranking1, ssl.official_ranking2, ssl.official_ranking3, NVL(ck.play_count, 0) AS ck_play_count, NVL(ck.win_count, 0) AS ck_win_count, NVL(ck.lose_count, 0) AS ck_lose_count from bookmark b left outer join streamer bs on bs.streamer_no = b.bookmark_target left outer join streamer_stat_list ssl on ssl.streamer_no = b.bookmark_target left outer join( select ck_streamer, count(*) as play_count, sum(case when ck_result='승리' then 1 else 0 end) as win_count, sum(case when ck_result='패배' then 1 else 0 end) as lose_count from ck_list group by ck_streamer ) ck on ck.ck_streamer = b.bookmark_target where b.bookmark_member=#{memberId} and b.bookmark_type='streamer' order by b.bookmark_time desc
